notes: Skyfire has NO programmatic account creation — signup is dashboard-only via email or Google OAuth (https://app.skyfire.xyz). API keys are provisioned per agent account in the dashboard. The verifier therefore uses a pre-provisioned SKYFIRE_API_KEY from env, the same pattern used for signbee. Real API base: https://api.skyfire.xyz/api/v1. Auth header: skyfire-api-key. Confirmed working endpoints: GET /api/v1/agents/balance (401 without key, correct JSON error otherwise), POST /api/v1/tokens (same), public JWKS at https://app.skyfire.xyz/.well-known/jwks.json. The JWKS endpoint is used as the unauthenticated HTTP probe to confirm the service is live.

steps.description: GET /api/v1/agents/balance — verifies API key is valid

assertions.description: API key is accepted by Skyfire (balance endpoint returns 200)

steps.description: GET /api/v1/agents/seller-services — list seller services for this agent
GET /.well-known/jwks.json — public JWKS endpoint (no auth required, confirms service is live)

assertions.description: JWKS endpoint returns 200 with public key
